rows.label: qev060103_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hah! This is amazing! It
really is just like I heard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0002
rows.name:
Poisons, hazardous materials, dangerous
substances[ST:wide ]— all this sketchy stuff
disappearing in an instant![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0003
rows.name:
This is going to be a huge business!
It makes being a BLADE look so
stupid, I can't even stand it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Huh? Are you in the same line
of business? Did you come all
the way out here to scavenge?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0005
rows.name:
I've already finished surveying this
area. So hurry up and disappear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_JNK0010
rows.name: Force

rows.label: qev060103_SEL0011
rows.name:
Attempt to capture Roselle
to save Shiraton.

rows.label: qev060103_JNK0020
rows.name: Dialogue

rows.label: qev060103_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask for her reasons as to
why she kidnapped Shiraton.

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0006
rows.name:
Tch! Getting found this quickly...
I really have no luck...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0007
rows.name:
But... I'm not going to let a get-rich-quick
opportunity like this slip away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0008
rows.name:
If you're going to get in my
way, I'll just have to make
you disappear right here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0009
rows.name:
A money-making scheme that practically
fell into my lap... There's no way
I'm sharing it that easily![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you're planning on stealing the
secret behind this big business...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0011
rows.name:
Sorry, but I'm going to have
to make you disappear! I've got
everything riding on this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hah! Good thing I brought my beloved
machine, "Gold Brave", just in case![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0013
rows.name:
What an expert... my "Gold Brave"
was completely destroyed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0014
rows.name:
Damn it! Do you have any idea
how much money I've poured into
customizing it up until now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0015
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0016
rows.name: Phew... Revoltant complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Hm, oh? Why is everyone gathered
here? Did something happen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ah! Could it be you brought the
Voltant you gathered for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ooh, this is some magnificent
Voltant! Thank you so much
for coming all this way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Eh? You came to rescue me from
being kidnapped by Roselle-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0021
rows.name:
No, no, kidnapping is completely out
of the question. While there was a bit
of a misunderstanding at first...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0022
rows.name:
I was allowed to revoltant such a
vast quantity of wonderful Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0023
rows.name:
I am truly grateful. Roselle-san
is a wonderful friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0024
rows.name:
Ha... haha... What a
bunch of space cadets...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0025
rows.name:
But... hey, this guy is saying it too.
Can't we just let this incident slide?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0026
rows.name:
I'm sorry for jumping the gun and
attacking you... But I'll let you in
on a piece of this money-making scheme.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0027
rows.name: ...Right? Please?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_JNK0110
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev060103_SEL0111
rows.name:
State that you will report the crime
of kidnapping to BLADE Headquarters.

rows.label: qev060103_JNK0120
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060103_SEL0121
rows.name:
Ask to hear the details of this
money-making scheme first.

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0028
rows.name: Heheh, I'm glad you asked![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0029
rows.name:
Listen, there's more stuff in NLA
that's a pain to deal with than you'd
think[ST:wide ]—what Zaruboggan call Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0030
rows.name:
Depending on the person,
they'd pay top dollar just
to have that stuff processed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0031
rows.name:
So, we pocket the massive payout, collect the
goods, and have the Zaruboggan process it for
free. It's pure profit with zero overhead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0032
rows.name:
...Right? It's the ultimate
money-making scheme![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0033
rows.name:
That's why I brought this guy here to
process a huge load of the stuff, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0034
rows.name:
I won't pull a rough stunt
like that ever again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0035
rows.name:
From now on, I'll hire them properly
as a legitimate business, so could
you overlook this incident?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'll even pay you a reward just for
turning a blind eye. How about it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_JNK0130
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev060103_SEL0131
rows.name:
State that you will report the crime
of kidnapping to BLADE Headquarters.

rows.label: qev060103_JNK0140
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev060103_SEL0141
rows.name:
Go along with Roselle's talk
and secure the reward.

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0037
rows.name:
Heheh, I'm glad you're a reasonable
person. Well then, take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0038
rows.name:
When we make even more profit, let's
rent out an expensive place for the
night and drink until dawn together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0039
rows.name:
Shiraton. I'm sorry for
playing rough this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0040
rows.name:
From now on, let's go through
the proper procedures and do
"business" together, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0041
rows.name:
"Business"... you say? I don't
quite understand, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0042
rows.name:
If you are willing to lend a
hand with our new initiative,
you are more than welcome.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0043
rows.name:
Alright, it's decided! From this moment
on, you are my business partner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0044
rows.name:
Let's discuss our future plans
on the way back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Well then, we'll be
heading back first![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0046
rows.name:
If you ever have any troublesome
stuff you need processed, just
let me know anytime![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0047
rows.name:
Tch, so this is where
it ends for me, huh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0048
rows.name:
I get it. At least let me turn myself in
so I can lighten my sentence a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0049
rows.name:
Ahhhh... I was going to start a company
using these guys, make bank...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0050
rows.name:
And surround myself with handsome
guys... Ugh, I can't even stand it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0051
rows.name:
Is there some sort of conflict
happening? It seems Earthlings
have their share of problems, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0052
rows.name:
Well, regardless, our new initiative
has started moving along nicely now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0053
rows.name:
I intend to run all over NLA to
revoltant the massive amounts
of Voltant you all produce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0054
rows.name: Thank you for your cooperation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060103_MSG0055
rows.name:
...Well then, I will be heading
back to the city ahead of you.[ST:wait ]
